records.question: Which documents named Review on French files dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 are related to the Population Research project, have a CV type with an excellent description, include government expense details, and belong to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files' AND statements.statement_details = 'Open Project'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.Document_ID
FROM Documents AS documents
JOIN Projects AS projects ON documents.Project_ID = projects.Project_ID
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses AS expenses ON documents.Document_ID = expenses.Document_ID
JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS doc_types ON documents.Document_Type_Code = doc_types.Document_Type_Code
JOIN Statements AS statements ON statements.Statement_ID = documents.Document_ID
WHERE documents.Document_Name = 'Review'
  AND documents.Document_Date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
  AND projects.Project_Details = 'Population Research'
  AND doc_types.Document_Type_Code = 'CV'
  AND doc_types.Document_Type_Description = 'excellent'
  AND expenses.Document_Details LIKE '%government%'
  AND statements.Statement_Details LIKE '%Open Project%'

records.question: Which documents named Review on UK files are linked to projects and have expenses associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Review on UK files'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id 
FROM Documents AS documents 
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses AS expenses ON documents.Document_ID = expenses.Document_ID 
WHERE documents.Document_Name = 'Review' AND documents.Document_Description LIKE '%UK%'

records.question: Which documents named Jevon Paper, dated exactly on 1983-08-24 17:10:26, are CVs with description excellent, belong to the Human Resource project, and have document details that are safety?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE documents.document_date = '1983-08-24 17:10:26' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'safety' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents.document_name = 'Jevon Paper' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND projects.project_details = 'Human Resource project'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id 
FROM Documents AS documents 
JOIN Projects AS projects ON documents.Project_ID = projects.Project_ID 
WHERE documents.Document_Name = 'Jevon Paper' 
AND documents.Document_Date = '1983-08-24 17:10:26' 
AND documents.Document_Type_Code IN (SELECT Document_Type_Code FROM Ref_Document_Types WHERE Document_Type_Name = 'CV' AND Document_Type_Description = 'excellent') 
AND projects.Project_Details = 'Human Resource' 
AND documents.Other_Details = 'safety'

records.question: Which Paper documents named Book on USA files, related to statements with details Private Project and expenses with details government, were created on or before 2013-01-26 15:15:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE statements.statement_details = 'Private Project' AND documents.document_name = 'Book on USA files' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND documents.document_date <= '2013-01-26 15:15:25' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Paper'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types doc_types ON documents.Document_Type_Code = doc_types.Document_Type_Code
JOIN Statements statements ON statements.Statement_ID = documents.Document_ID
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses expenses ON expenses.Document_ID = documents.Document_ID
WHERE doc_types.Document_Type_Name = 'Paper'
AND documents.Document_Name = 'Book'
AND statements.Statement_Details = 'Private Project'
AND expenses.Document_Details LIKE '%government%'
AND documents.Document_Date <= '2013-01-26 15:15:25'

records.question: Which books described as excellent and named Review on Canadian files are dated on or after 2012-12-27 19:09:18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Review on Canadian files' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents.document_date >= '2012-12-27 19:09:18'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id 
FROM Documents AS documents 
WHERE documents.Document_Name = 'Review' 
AND documents.Document_Description LIKE '%excellent%' 
AND documents.Document_Date >= '2012-12-27 19:09:18'

records.question: Which documents are linked to projects, have a document type with description 'good' and name 'Paper', have statements, and have expenses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'good' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Paper'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents AS documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS doc_types ON documents.Document_Type_Code = doc_types.Document_Type_Code
JOIN Statements AS statements ON statements.Statement_ID = documents.Document_ID
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses AS expenses ON expenses.Document_ID = documents.Document_ID
WHERE doc_types.Document_Type_Description = 'good' AND doc_types.Document_Type_Name = 'Paper'

records.question: Which documents are Books with a document type description that is excellent?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Documents.Document_ID 
FROM Documents 
JOIN Ref_Document_Types ON Documents.Document_Type_Code = Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Code 
WHERE Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Name = 'Books' 
AND Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Description = 'excellent'
